description: The Shortcuts (S) campaign, in its RECURRING regression form. Drives the six golden-resident `things-proxy-*` shortcuts via the runner's `shortcut` DSL step (guest writes the JSON input to a file and runs `shortcuts run <proxy> --input-path <in> --output-path <out>`; see docs/lab/harness.md). Proxies address by uuid via Find Items' ID filter + Find->act chains. First verdicts came from the L5 golden sitting (2026-07-09, lab/scripts/l5-consent-absorb.sh; docs/lab/s-campaign-results.md). CONSENT CONSTRAINT (oddities 5j): the output-class proxies (find-items/create-heading/edit-title/set-detail) are Always-Allowed = headless in clones, so S01-S03 + S-detail run under lab:run/regress. The delete-class proxies (delete-items/delete-items-permanently) have NO Always-Allow and re-prompt EVERY run — S04 + S-delperm are tagged `group: interactive`: the runner SKIPS them (documentation only; a human sitting via lab/scripts/l5-consent-absorb.sh exercises them). to-do->project conversion (former S05) is closed unsupported with no probe — the Shortcuts catalog has no Convert action (s-campaign-results.md). NOTE: the golden-resident find-items still ECHOES its input (the SX5 repair lives in shortcuts/things-proxy-find-items.shortcut but was never baked into this frozen golden) — S01 locks that echo behavior; a future golden rebuild flips it and the assertion drift is the signal.

probes.title: find-items read probe — the golden-resident proxy ECHOES its input (S01 correction, s-campaign-results.md); locks that behavior + proves the Shortcuts arm round-trips input->run->output
HEADING CREATE in an existing project — WORKS (L5 S02): Create Heading makes a type=2 row with project=<project uuid>; the one surface dead on URL (T09/U09) and AppleScript (A31)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S02-PROJ' AND type=1

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S02-HEAD' AND type=2

probes.title: HEADING RENAME — WORKS (L5 S03): Edit Items -> Set Title renames the type=2 row in place (heading seeded via create-heading in setup)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S03-PROJ' AND type=1
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S03-HEAD' AND type=2

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S03-HEAD-RN' AND type=2

probes.title: set-detail Reminder Time = "" — the IN-PLACE dated-reminder CLEAR (scf P3b): reminderTime -> NULL, startDate untouched. The only surface for this edit; backs the shipped todo.clear-dated-reminder op

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S-CLR-DATED' AND reminderTime IS NOT NULL AND startDate IS NOT NULL

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S-CLR-DATED' AND reminderTime IS NULL

probes.title: HEADING DELETE (delete-class) — WORKS (L5 S04): removes the heading row. INTERACTIVE: no Always-Allow, re-prompts every run (oddities 5j) — skipped by lab:run; run it in a human sitting (l5-consent-absorb.sh)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S04-PROJ' AND type=1
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S04-HEAD' AND type=2

probes.title: PERMANENT single-item delete (delete-class) — WORKS (L5 S-delperm): Delete Immediately hard-deletes one row, NO tombstone (oddity 5i). INTERACTIVE: no Always-Allow — skipped by lab:run; human sitting only

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S-DELPERM-ME'
